question: Will Euphoria Season 3 finish at 70 or above on Metacritic?
textDescription:
Euphoria Season 3 premiered on HBO on April 12, 2026 to a 44% viewership increase over Season 2 — but critical reception has been more muted. The season currently sits at 65 on Metacritic with the finale airing May 31, 2026.

This market resolves YES if Euphoria Season 3’s Metacritic score is 70 or higher as of June 7, 2026, one week after the finale airs to allow scores to fully aggregate. It resolves NO if the score remains below 70 on that date.

Resolution source: metacritic.com/tv/euphoria .
